review_text: Hospitality skills when in charge amount to zero. Stand over tactics I'll give a 10. Let's talk about work place and bullying. Compassion, scaring, raised 🤚 voices, part of every day living. So sad my late husband's money was spent on my choice of retirement.
The new management team are working hard to make sure this is a good place to stay!  👍👍👍
A very tidy park. All the people I meet where very friendly and happy to have a chat. it is within walking distance to the shops and movies
